calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change of Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and S. Vantree and Meredith Grier. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioners father Fabrice Alexandre Della Mea and mother Sophia Della Mea Park of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name Flora Kailani Della Mea to new name Flora Kailani Park Della Mea.
Decree Changing Name signed by the court.
